memory.summary: I'm ditching that assignment plan to eat with the crew; relationships matter way more than this reading.

I ordered food for the crew, proving I still value our bond over the missed deadline. Stress is climbing, but I'm not backing down on prioritizing us.

goals.description: Order pizza immediately to the group chat and demand everyone join the call within 10 minutes; if anyone brings up the missed deadline, aggressively interrupt with a meme or a loud complaint about how 'stressed' we all are.
goals.rationale: Affiliation (0.5) is my absolute priority. The assignment is already technically 'missed' (or at least late), so the only way to save the relationship with cohort_3 is to flood the channel with food and noise. My assertiveness means I'm taking control of the narrative by forcing a social event, and my impulsivity makes me ignore the fact that I have a reading due in 2 hours.

goals.description: Ignore the unread assignment and the professor's potential message until the food arrives; focus entirely on validating my teammates' feelings about the stress of this semester.
goals.rationale: My planning horizon is short. Thinking about the 0% progress on the analysis section right now ruins the vibe I just built. I need to prove loyalty to the team over the task. Procrastination bias (7) is kicking in hard here; dealing with the work later is better than risking a awkward silence now.
